items.title: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $405
items.description: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $400 to $405.

items.title: UBS Maintains Buy on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $422
items.description: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Buy and raises the price target from $400 to $422.

items.title: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $385
items.description: JP Morgan  analyst Jeffrey Zekauskas   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $378 to $385.

items.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $410
items.description: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $395 to $410.

items.title: SHW Q3 Deep Dive: Share Gains and Cost Controls Offset Ongoing Market Weakness
items.description: Paint and coating manufacturer Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) reported Q3 CY2025 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 3.2% year on year to $6.36 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $5.43 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.59 per share was 4.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
